rationale: An AssumeRole chain anomaly was detected: principal ci-role-prod assumed role arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/AdminAccess from source IP 185.220.101.45 (Tor exit node, high threat reputation). This pattern matches lateral_movement and privilege_escalation. The target role AdminAccess grants full_account blast radius. The source IP is not in any known CI/CD IP allowlist. Confidence 0.94.
summary: Critical IAM anomaly: unauthorized AssumeRole chain from Tor exit node to AdminAccess role. Immediate session revocation required.
key_findings: Anomaly type: privilege_escalation via unauthorized AssumeRole chain
Principal ci-role-prod assumed AdminAccess from Tor exit node 185.220.101.45
Blast radius: full_account — AdminAccess grants unrestricted AWS access
Source IP 185.220.101.45 not in CI/CD allowlist — known Tor exit node
AssumeRole traversed 3 hops — exceeds normal CI/CD pattern (1 hop)
recommendation: Revoke all active sessions for ci-role-prod immediately. Attach a DenyAll inline policy as an emergency guardrail. Audit CloudTrail for all actions taken since the anomalous AssumeRole at 2026-02-28T09:15:00Z. Escalate to L2 for policy review.
